1. **Goal**: Prove that restricting the extended version of `f` to `A` recovers `f`.

by
  have h_main : ‚ąÄ (x : A), (func_restrict (func_extend f v) A) x = f x := by
    intro x
    have h‚āĀ : x.val ‚ąą A := x.prop
    have h‚āā : (func_extend f v) x.val = f x := by
      have h‚āÉ : x.val ‚ąą A := h‚āĀ
      have h‚āĄ : (func_extend f v) x.val = (if h : x.val ‚ąą A then f ‚ü®x.val, h‚ü© else v) := rfl
      rw [h‚āĄ]
      have h‚āÖ : (if h : x.val ‚ąą A then f ‚ü®x.val, h‚ü© else v) = f ‚ü®x.val, h‚āÉ‚ü© := by
        simp [h‚āÉ]
      rw [h‚āÖ]
      have h‚āÜ : ‚ü®x.val, h‚āÉ‚ü© = x := by
        cases x with
        | mk val prop =>
          simp_all [Subtype.mk.injEq]
          <;> aesop
      rw [h‚āÜ]
    have h‚āÉ : (func_restrict (func_extend f v) A) x = (func_extend f v) x.val := rfl
    rw [h‚āÉ]
    rw [h‚āā]
  
  have h_final : func_restrict (func_extend f v) A = f := by
    funext x
    apply h_main
  
  apply h_final

by
  apply funext
  intro x
  have h : x.val ‚ąą A := x.prop
  -- Simplify (func_extend f v) x.val
  have h‚āĀ : (func_extend f v) x.val = f ‚ü®x.val, h‚ü© := by
    simp [h, func_extend]
    <;>
    aesop
  -- Now, we need to show that f ‚ü®x.val, h‚ü© = f x
  -- But since ‚ü®x.val, h‚ü© = x, we can use congr_arg
  have h‚āā : (‚ü®x.val, h‚ü© : A) = x := by
    apply Subtype.ext
    <;> simp_all
  calc
    (func_restrict (func_extend f v) A) x = (func_extend f v) x.val := rfl
    _ = f ‚ü®x.val, h‚ü© := h‚āĀ
    _ = f x := by rw [h‚āā]

by
  funext a
  simp [func_restrict, func_extend, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
  <;>
  cases' a with x hx <;>
  simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]
  <;>
  aesop

by
  funext a
  simp [func_restrict, func_extend, Subtype.ext_iff]
  <;>
  aesop

by
  funext a
  simp [func_restrict, func_extend]
  <;>
  aesop

by
  funext a
  simp [func_restrict, func_extend]
  <;>
  aesop

by
  have h_main : ‚ąÄ (x : A), (func_restrict (func_extend f v) A) x = f x := by
    intro x
    have h‚āĀ : (func_restrict (func_extend f v) A) x = (func_extend f v) (x : U) := by
      rfl
    have h‚āā : (func_extend f v) (x : U) = f x := by
      have h‚āÉ : (x : U) ‚ąą A := x.prop
      simp_all [func_extend, h‚āÉ]
      <;>
      aesop
    rw [h‚āĀ, h‚āā]
  
  funext x
  have h‚āā : (func_restrict (func_extend f v) A) x = f x := h_main x
  exact h‚āā

by
  ext a
  simp [func_restrict, func_extend, Subtype.ext_iff]
  <;>
  aesop

by
  have h_main : ‚ąÄ (a : A), (func_restrict (fun x : U => if h : x ‚ąą A then f ‚ü®x, h‚ü© else v) A) a = f a := by
    intro a
    simp [func_restrict, Subtype.coe_mk]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Set.mem_setOf_eq]) <;>
    (try { split_ifs <;> simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff] }) <;>
    (try { aesop }) <;>
    (try { simp_all [Subtype.coe_mk] }) <;>
    (try { aesop })
    <;>
    (try {
      have h‚āĀ : a.val ‚ąą A := a.prop
      simp_all [h‚āĀ]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
  
  have h_final : func_restrict (fun x : U => if h : x ‚ąą A then f ‚ü®x, h‚ü© else v) A = f := by
    funext a
    apply h_main
  
  have h1 : (fun x : U => if h : x ‚ąą A then f ‚ü®x, h‚ü© else v) = (fun x : U => if h : x ‚ąą A then f ‚ü®x, h‚ü© else v) := rfl
  have h2 : (fun x : U => if h : x ‚ąą A then f ‚ü®x, h‚ü© else v) = (fun x : U => if h : x ‚ąą A then f ‚ü®x, h‚ü© else v) := rfl
  simp_all [func_extend, Subtype.ext_iff]
  <;>
  aesop
